title: Make-Up
writer: Jeffrey Dell, Reginald Long, Hans Mahner-Mons
actors: Nils Asther, June Clyde, Judy Kelly
plot: Bux is born to a circus life. At the wish of his parents he studies to become a surgeon but forsakes a brilliant medical career for that of a circus clown. Joy, his young ward, is secretly in love with him, but tries to hide the f...
